column1: Stacking order of the widget. Increase if it sits behind other elements.
column2: Stacking order of the widget. Increase if it sits behind other elements.

column1: Widget UI language. "Auto" detects the browser/page language.

column1: Let visitors drag the button to reposition it.
column2: Let visitors drag the button to reposition it.

column1: Hide the widget on printed pages.

column1: Shortcut to open the widget (e.g. ctrl+alt+a). Empty disables it.

column1: localStorage key for saved visitor preferences. Change only to avoid conflicts.

column1: Log diagnostic messages to the browser console.

column1: Short note shown in the widget panel.
column2: Short note shown in the widget panel.

column1: Empty loads from the BAUER GROUP CDN (recommended, always current). Set only to self-host/mirror.
column2: Empty loads from the BAUER GROUP CDN (recommended, always current). Set only to self-host/mirror.

column1: Overrides the derived core bundle URL. Advanced self-hosting only.

column1: Overrides the derived stylesheet URL. Advanced self-hosting only.
